caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing. His shirt features the white text "I CN NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm, appearing to speak and smile as the scene progresses. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white garment, and various articles of clothing hang on racks. The walls are decorated with numerous small, framed photographs. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left showing a circular emblem and the word "SITE", and another on the right in red text that reads "BOOSTED BY LOT". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he continues to talk.
